review_text: It was one of the best caravans parks I’ve been to ,my dog loved and my kid loved it it has a great location also.

A great location, much improved since we went 50 years ago when I was a child! We were staying in our camper. The facilities and camp kitchen were superb.  We celebrated mothers day with the family and grand child with a bbq at the camp kitchen.  We did walks both ways on the beach front, cycled to Grange, had dinner at the yacht lunch and coffee at the cafe on the beach.  With a short walk we took the train to the CBD, lunch, movie and footy then back home on the train - so easy.  Highly recommended.
Great location, very clean rooms, quiet and very friendly staff.

Spent 8 nights at Brighton Beachfront Park as my daughter had surgery scheduled.  Very clean, well maintained and quiet park. Loved being on the Beachfront, perfect for long walks in the morning.  Super close to lifesaving club and yatch club for meals or a short or a short walk to Seacliff hotel.  Closest supermarket is about a 30 minute walk which i enjoyed. Park has bikes for hire,  you can ride all the way along the beach path to Glenelg.  |Our cabin was spotless and very comfortable. |Absolutely no complaints.

We stayed here for for six nights over Easter it was packed and so it should be. It is a fantastic park. Wonderful staff great amenities close to beach close to pubs all in walking distance. All amenities were very clean. We will definitely be back.

As long as I’m alive I will tell everyone know not to stay here!!! Blame nikki for your bad review

She knows what her demeanour and was. So don’t bother with the reply… just asks her

Probably the best place I've stayed in a fair while.
Clean cabin, decent view with a nice restaurant down the road.
It's pretty good.
Beautiful beach front park. Wonderful staff and excellent facilities|Lovely clean cabin. Have also stayed in our van. Would definitely recommend, and definitely be back.
Even though we only live about an hour away it was such a lovely break in a beautiful area, friendly staff, clean facilities and some beautiful cafes in walking distance.
Great facilities, grounds and staff. Location is perfect for city visit, south coast and McLaren Vale wines
A great park on the edge of the beach

Fabulous location right on the beach and with cafes and other eateries in very close proximity. The entire place is dog friendly which was amazing for our furry family member who had a blast. Shout out to Trev and his team who helped make our stay wonderful.

Fabulous place to stay, especially with your furry friends as the entire park is dog friendly. Located right on the beach and within very close proximity to cafes and eateries made it so handy. The management and staff were amazing and friendly. Highly recommend

Pitches are squashed in and caravans are on top of each other.

The campers were all friendly but the staff were not helpful at all.

The only thing about this site is the location we couldn't complain at all regarding this, but if you are looking for a site with privacy,space and welcoming this is not the site for you.

Definitely do not recommend. Every single morning we were woken up at 430am by a barking dog next door, every single morning we asked the managers to do something about it. Nothing was done, the people next door didn't care, when we talked to the manager about it he said it wasn't a problem, that dogs are allowed to bark whenever they want and that because we complained about the same people's music that was shaking our windows, we must just be complainers... When we asked for a solution, the only one offered was that we could leave, because apparently we're the problem. |Male manager seriously needs an education on speaking to women, talking down to them and treating them like they're hysterical all because he apparently was upset that we'd woken him up with our calls at 430am...|Was ~our 10th stay, but we'll never be back.

One of the best spots in Australia not just SA. Top coastal cliffs, rocky shore and beach. Nice park, clean with modern facilities. RV dump too. The old dunes separating the park from the beach now have a super paved boardwalk connecting Kingston Park with Seacliff and beyond. The park is next to the Nest, a top beachside cafe, but book early in school hols! Above the park on the cliffs is the heritage Kingston Park House. Great walking and steps up and down connecting the areas. Brilliant.

Have stayed here many times before but we will not be back. Was woken up 5 mornings in a row at 4.30am to a neighbours dog barking as he left for work leaving it barking at everyone and every car going past. Called management who did not seem to care and blamed us for this stating 'dogs bark its a pet friendly park'. Manager acted like it was our fault dog was barking and waking us up and spoke rudely to me stating that they would not speak to the pet owner or follow-up any action, he was more annoyed that we had called and woken him up, told us to leave if we were unhappy. Have been travelling fulltime for 3 years and never had such poor management and unprofessional behaviour from staff.

Update/edit to reply to owner: even in this feedback you have highlighted that 'its a young puppy' and that's why its ok to bark every morning for 20 or so minutes as it's owner stands there letting it bark. If it's every morning, how is this intermittent ? There were many other times where we did not ring you when it was barking please stop insisting that we are the problem here making out as if we are being dramatic, we are well aware of dog behaviour and what's appropriate in a caravan park and in 3 yrs of travelling have never complained before... but sure somehow we are the issue here.

I thoroughly enjoyed my time here and would happily return. Highly recommend for anyone, especially solo travellers, looking for a safe and welcoming place to stay. Location is perfect, amenities were clean and modern, quiet and peaceful especially during the night!

Fantastic place for sunsets. Great staff, stocked up store, clean, well kept gardens and lawn, respectful locals, great beach for swimming or snorkelling and fresh air conditioned facilities for family cooking and dining.
Back again in 2026 and the sunsets never get old!

A wonderful holiday park in Seacliff , Brighton holiday park was the perfect location, directly on the beachfront. Spacious sites and clean and tidy facilities. Family friendly. 20 minutes train trip to Adelaide city.
Amazing Holiday Park, clean, spacious and thoughtful activities for the kids, location and views are incredible. Thanks for a great trip.
Beautiful location and amenities are extremely clean. Right next to the beach and surf life saving club which are also now dog friendly. Highly recommend
This is the 3rd time we have to stayed here. Amazing location & beach views.|So close to cafes & eateries. Quiet & so relaxing.
Beautiful park packed in like Sardines but cant help that in such a sort after location
Great family location and great beach

Excellent 👍 Will definitely stay again
There was 13 of us and everyone loved it here
Great CP on the beach, although can be windy. Clean modern amenities and grounds are well kept.

Brighton Beachfront Caravan Park er uden tvivl en af de bedste campingpladser, vi har boet på.||Beliggenheden er helt fantastisk – lige ved havet og den smukke esplanade, som følger kysten. En aften sad vi på en bænk med et glas vin og nød solnedgangen over vandet – en virkelig skøn oplevelse.||Om morgenen var stemningen lige så dejlig, hvor vi kunne se folk glide stille forbi på stand-up paddleboards ude på vandet.||På esplanaden kunne man købe god barista-kaffe, og lige i nærheden af campingpladsen lå en surferrestaurant, hvor man kunne få både mad og drinks fra terrassen med udsigt over havet.||Personalet var venligt, behageligt og hjælpsomt med tips til seværdigheder i området.||Priserne var samtidig helt rimelige.||Vi kan kun give vores varmeste anbefalinger.
Heel leuke camping. Goed uitgerust en prachtig gelegen.

A big thank you to Brighton CP staff.
We were booked in to stay 6 nights. When booking in, unaware at the time, I was having a stroke. Ended up in hospital the next morning. So my wife was left on her own with our motorhome, tow vehicle and cat. Staff were able to accommodate us for 3 weeks, moving the motorhome to another site for my wife. We cannot thank them enough for helping us out. I’m recovering well and we’re back on the road.

Campsite idéalement placé face à la mer bénéficiant de plusieurs points de restauration à proximité immédiate et servant de bon plats, les facilités sont également propres et fonctionnelles. Les seules petits bémol le manque d ombre et l absence d intimité les campements étant très très proche les uns des autres sans reel cache vue.
This remains one of our favored holiday places. The kids love it, it's Cosy and neat, right in the beach. What more do you need?
Wir waren im angrenzenden Café und hatten schnellen Kontakt zu einer Camperin und die Lage ist einfach toll. Direkt am Strand abseits der Stadt mach hier das erholen möglich.
It was good but I found like 6 cockroaches

What a gem!  I shouldn’t have done 5⭐️ because to be frank I don’t want to share!  Met another camper there who has been going there for 40 years, I think that sums it up perfectly.  Let’s talk pros
*clean, comfortable, spacious amenities blocks
* good sized sites, some with great shade
*pet friendly
*plenty for kids to do
*on the beach
*surf club next door for meals
^^unable to comment on rooms as were were camping

We ran into trouble with our pre booked air BnB that didn’t accommodate our vehicle and trailer and were stuck with out a place for the night. We called Brighton and they were nothing but helpful - they had a room for us and were so helpful. We had a large trailer and they even let us store it for free at the back of the property for the night. Would 100% recommend and the next time we come through coming from Perth will 100% be back to let our kids check out the property and beach as we just didn’t have the time.

Nicest people and great facilities . 10/10.

Still my favourite park of all time.
I’ve travelled with my caravan in 5 states and this park is such a gem. Convenient to the city and Glenelg but its own live of paradise. Amazing hill climb for views and fitness on east boundary. Stunning beach on the west. You can park so close to the beach!!!  Very dog friendly beach.
Aimee & Trevor are gregarious great people come on down caravans or Beachside villas

Prima caravanpark. Vlak aan zee echter geen zeezicht door de dijk waarop een fiets/looppad ligt.
Door 15 min. naar het trein station te lopen en de trein doet er 25 min. over om in de stad te komen, ben je relatief snel in de stad.
Sanitair is schoon en netjes, maar die vreselijke reclame radio die elke dag aanstaat. Zet af dat ding, heeft geen nut is alleen maar irritant.
Ook de wifi werkt niet goed, heel vervelend als je net een map offline wilt zetten.
Really great location, clean facilities and large pitches. Special mention to the friendly reception team and to the handy man at reception who refilled our gas bottle at such a great rate!
When we come to Adelaide Brighton Beach Caravan Park is our regular place to stay. Great location, friendly helpful staff and the accomodation is fantastic.
Absolutely lovely staff..they go above and beyond. The location is beautiful, right on the beach!!
Even saw a pod of  dolphins during our stay, great coffee available. Nice site. Spotless amenities

Wir waren mit dem Camper dort auf der letzten Etappe vor unserer Rückreise.
Der Campground liegt direkt an der Düne zum Strand und kurz vor Adelaide.
Waschräume und Toiletten sind sehr gut und sauber.
Die Stellplätze sind schön eben und haben alles was man braucht.  Strom, Wasser, Abwasser, Dumpstation sind gut zugänglich und an der richtigen Stelle.
Stayed for three nights , wish I could stay forever lovely spot when the weather is nice
A well maintained park with direct beach access.

Great van park, ideal location, wonderful helpful staff. What a great spot with views forever, clean amenities and awesome onsite cafe for food, coffee and the views over the water make sunsets very very special. The surf club food just next door was delicious and reasonably priced
Great location right on the beach amenities were very clean and updated
I've never stayed but I walk past most days, and enjoy coffee at Nest Cafe, but I see the place in all seasons and everyone looks happy there. If I caravaned, I'd go.
Great Park right on the Beach in Brighton.Local Surf and Yacht clubs next door,and the Seacliff pub just down the road.

Really amazing place, I love staying here. Being beachfront the vibe is SO peaceful and refreshing! The park is quiet and very safe. I sleep well. I've stayed in both the villas and cabins and it's wonderful they have budget/pet friendly options for those travelling with pets. The staff are very kind and welcoming too. Thank you!
Lovely location, staff and amenities.
Third time we have Stayed Here & Definitely won't be the Last. Great Cabin 👍 Extra Friendly Staff. Clean, Quiet Location. Right next to the Beach. Amazing Sunsets.

Rooms are not great! Bedsheets were dirty and had a foul smell.

Probably better for campers than room stays
Brilliant park. Stayed for a week in our caravan. Right next to the beach, great cafe with awesome coffee, right next to the Surf Club, and all dog friendly. Will come again.

Brighton Beachfront Holiday Park

Dont Pay Upfront - Its a trap!!!

You don't want me to write a review. I am homeless at the moment and not even that justified a reasonable reason for you to refund me when... There were noone around me in a powered suite and it was uncomfortable sleeping knees up in a hatchback when in a fully grown man, my sister paid for a motel for me and I stayed 1 night at your caravan park. You pocketed over $100 and showed not a single shred of humanity or sympathy for my situation. I WISH that no one has to ever experience my situation after experiencing what I have and homelessness is just the to of the iceberg. Shame on you for being so cold and callous. It's disgusting behaviour. It makes me ill thinking about it.

Stayed here for 3 nights on a trip from NSW back to Victoria (the long way 😉).  We’ve stayed in a few different parks on the trip but this one is the best by miles.  Lovely and green throughout with views of the ocean from most sites (we missed a beach front site but it hardly masters).  An array of cabin options for those who don’t have their own van.  Prices for powered site very competitive and service super friendly and helpful!  Would stay here again for sure!

Absolutely gorgeous destination!!! The beachfront camping spots are wonderfully located. Amenities are nice and clean and enough cubicles so as to not have to line up for showers or even toilets which for a women’s bathroom is hard to find.

I feel it's underrated; the location is beautiful, it's so close to dining, shopping and other amenities.
And, it's dog friendly.
The accessible accommodation was very suitable for my requirements and clean.

Bad management. Attracts a bad crowd. I stayed here a fortnight ago and won’t be back. Some of the positive reviews seem like their friends of the new management as they even include advertisement photos and if you filter by lowest we aren’t the only ones who have problems with the new owners. I came here a long time ago with previous owners without complaint.
Great park, right on the beach and close to all locations.

Great Location, We booked a Pet Friendly Villa for 5 nights, unfortunately, the cabin was absolutely filthy, I discovered Mold Above the bathroom shower, I don’t think the cabin was cleaned, the bathroom door stopper was missing, There was no Tv in the main bedroom, The beds are quite uncomfortable, The Tv Reception is a bit poor, The fold down bunk is short and my grandmother hit her head on it, The Cooktop Was not a gas stove, The camp kitchen oven did not work properly, there was not much power outlets, making it hard to charge your devices, The fridge is small, The Wifi is the worst thing ever, Hackers might be able to steal your personal information,

I ask everything should get investigated and renovated.
Well manicured park, right on the beach front. Very clean amenities. Staff very friendly. Cafes along the beach front. The esplanade walk is very enjoyable. Lots of people. Friendly atmosphere.
Just spent a couple of nights here on a powered van site. Must give a shout out to the hosts - brillliant service - thank you! Great location and excellent facilities.
Great place to stay 👌
Beachside and very clean.

The staff at the Brighton Caravan Park are amazing, thoughtful and considerate people especially when it comes to Family Friendly Holidays! We love staying at Brighton Caravan Park and look to forward to our future stays!
Great hidden gem! We are now regular visitors and recommend this place to friends. Perfect spot right on the beach front!
Great park right on the water👍

Great location and friendly reception. We booked an Ocean View Cabin for one night and were enjoying our stay until we went to bed only to find sand in the sheets at the bottom of the bed. I can only assume that the sheets hadn’t been changed from previous guests. I attempted to contact management but have not had any response.
Pretty disappointing.

A great holiday park for the whole family including the furbies even have allocated cabins for them, great kids play area, mini golf and the beach only a few steps away to enjoy those beautiful sunsets. We found the staff so friendly and flexible. Definitely a must visit.

Bedroom a bit small making it hard to get around in a wheelchair at times. Great location, right on the beach, straight onto the board walk. Wifi, not very user friendly but luckily the staff are. Will stay there again.

We absolutely love this caravan park. Such a amazing place to stay in Adelaide with a beautiful view. Good shops and restaurants in walking distance and the beach infront of your door. Service is great and all amenities are always clean. Sites were spacious and clean. Special saving deals give it a great value for the price!
Really like this place. Beach bbq sunset Nice caravan It just amazing and wonderful
Beautiful sea views and facilities are clean

I spent two days in a cabin, was fully equipped with cooking utensils. Amazing location. I Highly recommend this place. I will  be back to visit again.
Regards Michele
Absolutely stunning place to stay. And the puppy loved it.

Fabulous 👌 Park, stunning views, great amenities, a little pricey but well worth it. You can walk into town along the board walk or on the beach. Many people in all hours of the night run or bike ride on the board walk which suprised us, sometimes at 3am when we woke for a bathroom stop we saw people running & bike riding along the board walk with their head torches on, was a little frightened at 1st but then realised this is just the norm for alot that live here in the area 😀
Friendly helpful staff and great location right on the beach.
An amazing stay at a great location. The beach front camp site was spot on.
What a lovely  caravan park the staff are friendly and the park is immaculate

We have just stayed a week with our pooch. It was a beautiful Caravan Park, kept extremely clean with great amenities. Right on the beach, with a lovely Cafe and special pizza nights at the surf life saving club next door. Would recommend to anyone, great central park to make day trips around Adelaide.

Great place to stay.
Would have to have the best amenities set up I have ever seen.
Other parks Would do better if they had the same standards.
Staff at counter were great and helpful.
Only down side was we were about 15 mins late packing up ( due to a break in equipment)and had to deal with the time police on the golf cart.
Probably could do with a bit of coaching in communicating with customers.
In all fantastic park highly recommend.
A fab holiday park in Adelaide. Very well managed and extra quiet at night. The Villa we had was well maintained and clean, with most things you could need.

Right on beachfront. Beautiful sunsets with a well used walkway along the beach. Lovely park, level sites, most on cement slabs. Immaculate amenities with games room, camp kitchen etc. Will fill gas bottles which is a plus. 4kg $16.  Wifi very poor, need to sit in camp kitchen to access park wifi. Train 300/400m away but is up a hill if you have bad knees like me. Cafe on site very popular. Yacht Club next door, hotel 500m along beachfront.

We stayed in one of the cabins just outside the boom gate, which was hectic  on occasions when people arrived as the check-in bay was a bit on the small side. Despite this, a beautiful place well maintained and very relaxing.

Nous sommes restés une nuit dans ce camping dans notre van sur un emplacement avec électricité.
C’était une incroyable expérience, peut être le meilleur campement que nous avons testé durant notre road trip!
Il est situé juste au bord d’une plage immense, avec une promenade qui longe toute la côte, qui mène à une jetée et à un quartier pleins de restaurants.
L’ambiance est chaleureuse et vivante, le personnel est très accueillant.
Les sanitaires sont propres.
Le coucher de soleil est absolument incroyable, nous l’avons regardé du haut de la terrasse du restaurant juste à côté du camping. N’hésitez pas à vous arrêter ici que vous soyez en van, en camping-car ou si vous voulez louer une cabine.
Powered camping site was great, great facilities and excellent location. Exposed to the wind and not much shade but on a good day was perfect. Friendly staff, we would stay here again.

A beautiful pet friendly park, walking distance to the beach and nestled amongst suburbia. Not far from shops and restaurants and many other attractions Adelaide has to offer.
The staff are very helpful too. Thanks Jackie.

The location of the holiday park is great, practically on the beach and sand itself. The park seems to be catered more to caravans and motorhomes, as the cabins appear to have been given the last thought.

The cabin we stayed in was neat enough when we entered. There are two rooms, one with a regular bed and one with a set of bunk beds. There are several sets of fees to be aware of - I have included photos of these in the review for any prospective guest’s interest.

Unfortunately, the bathroom was in a state. The stopper was broken and made noise when opening and closing the door, there is mould above the shower, and the toilet tissue is one ply.

It is a great place to bring the family for a long weekend or holiday.  You can enjoy the beach, sailing, boogyboarding, or a walk at sunset.  The cabin however is old.  The plantation blinds dusty.  Walking barefoot inside my feet were filthy in no time.  If you are looking for luxury, think twice. Also expect cochroaches and  spiders inside your cabin
Recommend you   bring your own caravan and there is a designated BBQ area, but bring your own.  Still it is very popular so you will need to book ahead.
Beautiful views, quiet and friendly

Ok so I have just arrived to what could be a great site..problem is there is a specific way the motorhome has to face…apparently we can’t go in front first..(giving us a perfect view of the  beach and ocean) The motorhome has to go in backwards giving us no sun and a view of the side of the caravan next door..Spoke to the office girls..They were pleasant but very unhelpful..
Why come to a beachside, perfectly located caravan park to look at a grey caravan wall..
Very , very unhappy..

We stayed there for 5 days with our camper while going to Womad. The good parts: friendly reception, grassy areas, mostly levelled, feels clean, great amenities modern and clean, great laundry and kitchen, kids play ground, great swimming beach next to the camp, 15 mn walk to train station and 30 mn in the city, good cafes and restaurants nearby.  The not so good: very cramped and difficult to reverse in if you have a long caravan.
Great powered sites and awesome staff.

Oh my goodness nearly didn’t stay here as all they had left for caravans was ensuite at $76 a night , so glad we did though, what a beautiful place is Brighton Beach we were so close to the beach. The beach was pet friendly the pub was also as well as yacht club and cafe , beautiful walkway along the shore front and easy walk into main part of Brighton .  The ensuite we didn’t want was fantastic we felt very spoilt , I didn’t want to leave this place!
Excellent get away

The best caravan park we have ever stayed in
Excellent location 👏

ABSOLUTELY stunning location, direct beach frontage! This is my fourth visit here…only live locally but it’s a beautiful escape from hectic life and can stay here with my Westie puppy’s!  Last February 2 weeks, this February 3 weeks, next year extended to 4 weeks. Aimee and her team in the office are  lovely, friendly and so helpful. Trevor and the maintenance team always out helping campers to park, keep the grounds fabulous, even smackos for my westies! I work in a customer service role and recognise EXCEPTIONAL service….the team here have nailed it!
A clean park very well maintained. Right on the ocean. Restaurants, pubs and cafes all nearby, walking distance!

Very disappointing - unit was not clean - shower has mould (No. 6 ) around the edge of the base. Could not get ABC 2 -- yet we are in Kingston Park!! - TV did not work without pixalating until we turned off the two overhead fluorescent lights ! When bed linen was requested for the single bed it did not arrive so we had to go and get from the office - therefore first night was spent sleeping on the mattress protector. Such a shame as this park is in an excellent spot.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at the Brighton Beachfront Holiday Park in Adelaide, and it was an exceptional experience. We stayed for 4 nights from 20th Feb 2025 to the 24th Feb 2025. We travelled with our 13 year old pug. The park's prime beachfront location offers breathtaking ocean views, making it a perfect spot for relaxation and enjoying nature's beauty.

Our powered site was literally 20 metres to the beach. We woke up to the sounds of waves.

The park's facilities are impressive. From the modern BBQ areas and camp kitchen to the brand-new 9-hole mini golf and games room, there's something for everyone. The cleanliness and maintenance of the amenities were commendable.

Staff are friendly and knowledgeable.

The location is unbeatable. With the beach just a few steps away, we enjoyed daily walks along the shore with our dog. The proximity to local eateries and shops made it convenient to explore the area.

Overall, Brighton Beachfront Holiday Park offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and natural beauty. Whether you're seeking a family getaway or a peaceful retreat, this park is an excellent choice. It is also pet friendly and we received a small bag of dog treats on arrival. Highly recommend.
Great location and well provisioned cabin, good service with change of sheets and towels offered for longer term stays > 7 days

The ladies in reception were extremely helpful, friendly and professional. The groundsman/maintenance guys again helpful and friendly, don't change the staff 😁
The only downside was very poor wifi,we were in the middle of the park and got nothing. The only fault which stopped me giving it a 5 star, not the staffs fault, the council needs to remedy this.
We stayed in the RV park without caravan. Loved every bit of it. The groundsmen crews are excellent if you need anything very helpful

First time visitor booked online from entering reception to the friendly greeting received from the lovely customer service lady who offered advice and assistance with local knowledge and maps. Well laid out park good amenities with different site options. Old fashioned service with a smile, good groundskeeper and maintenance thank you.
Would highly recommend to add to your destination. There was a mix of caravans, pop tops, motorhomes, tents and camper trailers.
Great spot with good powered sites and clean amenities
Great weekend away with family and friends. Very annoying having a code for the rest rooms but it is understandable. Great location. Right on the beach.

Great location on a great beach within a short walk to local cafe, surf club and pub.  Good bed.  Was in a budget cabin at the front of the park at the entrance.  The only reason I didn't give a higher rating was due to the filth of the cabin floor making our feet black after a shower. Appears the floor has been vacuumed but not washed for quite awhile. Kept shoes on thereafter. Will return as it's a great park and not too big.

Access / egress via steep entry. Sites well looked after but a challenge to get in without bothering anybody.
Amenities were excellent and well maintained. Very close to the beach and near by very popular cafe. Camp has facilities for hire such a carts, bikes etc. Very popular site, booking well ahead advised.

Very apparent management has changed at this park. Have been here for 5 years in a row with the original managers lovely. Since staying here I have been interrogated on the phone and asked to come up to the office about unpaid children and dogs. I do not have a dogs nor have children. We have family staying here and kids have been on our site from time to time but are paid for under their own site. I was asked what site they were on and had to go through with the office staff all the site my family is staying on to confirm the kids are paid be left alone.  If you have a tent you are asked to move it daily so Amy the Park Manager tell me. Apparently I have agreed to this in my sign agreement. I have heard of other guests throughout my stay also complaining about this contrary to the response below. Good luck!

The location is perfect, literally 10 seconds away from the beach. I’m travelling with my dog and the beach is pet friendly. Toilets and showers are good too. To caravan park is very busy so if you looking something more private I recommend book a cabin or another place. Overall I really enjoyed
Terén

We had the ambient cabin.
Plenty of room for wheelchair access.
Beautiful view. Lovely friendly staff and fellow travellers.
Amenities are great and clean.
Thank you for a wonderful holiday.
A nice & quiet holiday park right on the beach, within walking distance to the local pubs & cafe's. The sites are spacious and well looked after, but the internal roads are a bit narrow.

Good showers, small roads and sites.Advertised with wi fi, been here 4 days and nothing.Talked to people been here a week and nothing.Lift your game Brighton Council or remove your advert. Y O Y no WI FI.

Beautiful green grass with a mesh floor caravan site located on the beach which is very well maintained to very high standards
Facilities are always very clean
Friendly reception staff and maintenance staff who go out of their way to help you in every way
Highly recommend a stay here, you will not be disappointed
Narrow road's makes it difficult to back a caravan onto site. But the location is 5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
A lovely caravan park, my family has stayed here for 70+ years through ownership and name changes and redevelopment.  The only consistent thing being it's location.

My husband and I would like to say a huge thank you to Amie and Trevor and to all the lovely staff.  You have all gone above and beyond with everything.  And we appreciate your kindness and so very caring all of you . We will miss you all and this beautiful park . I wish you all the very best and I hope you all have a wonderful Christmas and happy new year.  To everyone that reads this . This is the best caravan park I've ever stayed in.  It's definitely a five star 🌟 park . It has something for everyone from the beautiful beach on its door step . To minie golf to fun three wheel bikes for the kids to a games room . It definitely scored a 10 out of 10 from us . So thank you so much everyone we will miss you all . David and Tanya
Lovely view, access to cafes and restaurants nearby.

We had a wonderful stay at the Beachfront. . All the staff were genuinely friendly, making us feel really welcome. We stayed in an ensuite site which was brilliant! Beautiful modern bathroom - really lovely- and so convenient!

We loved our time here so much that we extended our stay! Sites are spacious and so close to the beach! Amenities and camp kitchen are lovely and clean. Staff obviously love their jobs and really care. We'd recommend anyone to stay here, well certainly be back

Magnifique ! On est resté ici 28 jours, la vue est superbe, les couchers de soleil sont tous uniques, les gérants et le personnel sont toujours arrangeants, adorables, et pour avoir  été dans plus d’une vingtaine de campings en Australie, celui-ci a une cuisine bien équipée, toujours propres, ainsi que les douches et les toilettes ⭐️
Les emplacements sont spacieux, je recommande vivement !
Merci pour tout !

I requested a half hour extension on checkout to 10.30am and was knocked back. There were a few drops of rain early morning and I wanted the canvas to dry before packing. I've never been knocked back for an extra half hour in all my travels. Also going into Sunday night I know they're no where near full either. Small things like this equals poor customer service. I work in the industry and will not be recommending.

Great place to be. We stayed in the cabins with my family and we enjoyed our stay. The feeling of waking up with a beach view from your lounge is amazing. We loved the sunrise and sunsets.
Friendly staff, clean rooms and well maintained. We look forward to returning again. Highly reccomend

Caravan site with ensuite
Excellent
Great location! It’s our go to spot when in Adelaide bit out of the city but perfect for beach location

Great RV park, very clean and excellent customer service.
Highly recommend

We had a powered caravan site right on the ocean side. The sites are spacious with mesh floors for the annex. The amenities were the best we have seen so far. They were extremely clean and modern. We will definitely be back to stay for a longer period.
Caravan sites well maintained by grounds people,  staff welcoming, good location. Winter time with strong winds you will be mindful for annex etc as wind comes straight off the sea.

Great place to stay with a caravan and your family.
Plenty of things to do in the area and in the park.
Great fresh amenities.
Walking distance to a good surf club and pub.

Clean park and amenities. The sites are very tight for a 21.6ft van. Avoid the sites at the northern end of the park unless you want to be kept up all night from the music from the surf club next door.
Everything is perfect, just a little bit expensive.
You will have to look pretty hard to find something wrong with this park. Great location,  immaculate grounds, friendly staff and clean amenities. Great stuff.

We stayed here for 3 nights on our trip around Australia and absolutely loved this place, could have stayed longer if time allowed and will absolutely be back, lovely clean park with all amenities required and a great location, quiet, incredible views and close to everything you need. Can’t wait for the next visit- thank you all 🤍
not so safe after dark

Absolutely horrible managers here. This place used to be amazing but our recent visit was a disaster and will not return. The female manager (Aaimee I believe) was impossible to deal with after a mistake she made with our booking, she spoke to us with such an attitude that we left the park before our original booking was due to end. Jacky was the only positive we took from our recent stay as she has always been so welcoming in the past but her professionalism is destroyed by the managers lack of professionalism. It’s sad at how the park has to down hill so quickly

Absolutely loved staying here! It was my family's first time stay in the ocean view spa villa! Definitely would love to come back when the weather is warmer so we can utilise the beach a little more 😊

It's always great to stay here, we love it. We have Camped, Camper trailered, Pet Cabin and now Van. And used many of the site's. The new Cafe is a great addition for a morning coffee. Highly recommend

This place is amazing. We spent a week and it’s going to become our regular spot. Beachfront access with walking distance from a cafe and eateries. Customer service goes above and beyond - they texted me to tell me I’d accidentally left my internal car light on! We were sad to leave.
Wonderful, helpful staff. Loved our caravan site. Beautiful views.

Great location right on beach, some staff made us feel unwanted as our kids were playing in park kicking footballs and riding there bikes,  he was monitoring and watching us like a hawk, Felt abit uncomfortable. But otherwise great place to stay.
Aside from the steep street entry and exit to the park, really a nice place. Beachfront to the max, and close to everything and the city.....
Staff friendly and accommodating, rooms clean and tidy and location is fantastic. Highly recommend.

Great location!!!
Booked a powered site and have an 8.3m van. We were given a site that just fit our caravan length wise. We could not open our awning and park our car within the site. The roads are very tight, so a caravan over 22ft is going to struggle if the park is full.
There were 2 sites opposite which would have suited us. 1 was empty, and 1 was given to a smaller RV.
Staff should be given training on which sites can handle larger vans.
I would have preferred to be turned away, to be honest.
Have not been there
We have stayed here on numerous occasions and we will stay again
I found this place to be fantastic. Very clean lovely people and it's pet friendly

We love this park, the staff are amazing and always very helpful and friendly.  The location is perfect, and the groundskeepers are and always willing to lend a hand. This caravan park is the perfect spot for some rest & relation. I will be back there very soon .

This park is in the most beautiful position, right on the beach. It has a wonderful esplanade to catch a walk or run every day. It also has a Surf Club and  Yacht Club alongside. There is a very well frequented Cafe on site.
One of the best

Feels like a new caravan park. Very well maintained. We stayed in a cabin, and it was very clean and neat, not the kind of tired cabin you might expect in a well established caravan park. Has a very decent mini golf and games room with table tennis.

The location is fantastic. Right on the beach, and walking distance to a nice pub, yacht club and surf club along a board walk.

Wifi was provided, but we couldn’t reach it in our cabin, you would have to go close to reception or in the games room. So we pretty much didn’t have wifi. We tried a DVD one night but either the player or disc was busted because it wouldn’t work. Also, the table tennis table was broken by some kids on the second night and not fixed, so we only got one go. Another thing is the hot water is quite dangerous for kids, as it gets close to boiling temperature from the tap.

Loved our stay at this caravan park! The beautiful staff went above and beyond for us while we were here, squeezing us in when we needed extra nights. My partner proposed to me at the beach out the front so it will always hold a special place in our hearts. Can’t wait to come back.

We recently relocated from qld. During our stay here we have encountered the most friendly and accomodating staff. I will gladly recommend Brighton Holiday park. Clean amenities, clean camp kitchen, great location.

Great little spot right on the beach, bike ridable to Glenelg.
Friendly staff and great modern amenities.

This place is a dream. Definitely the best caravan park I've stayed at in Australia.
Right on the beach with access to heaps of food and attractions.
The park itself is brilliant! Top-notch facilities

Been coming here for 8-9 years and booked a particular site 12 months in advance only to arrive on the day and told no we are putting you elsewhere. Would have been nice to get some warning in order  to book in else where. Yet the other three couples managed to get the sites that they booked at the same time as me. Extremely disappointed with the staff member who had no empathy. Would havs expected a courtesy call or email to say that they decided move us.
Read the fine print, you don't always get the site you booked 12 months in advance. Don't book sites near the new kiosk It's rather noisy.
Schöner Platz direkt am Meer. Zug in die Innenstadt ist gut zu erreichen. WLAN auch in der letzten Ecke
Went for a 4 night stay.. great customer service, location and overall park. This place is great for everyone and they is something for all. Clean cabins and sites with easy walks to many things.

This park is in a great location, right on the beach with a walking / riding path that runs along the beach for miles. BBQ areas,  amenities and children’s playground were all in excellent condition, with a great little mini golf.
The Managers and staff were so  helpful and friendly, and in-fact they went above and beyond with their assistance to my wife, when I took ill and was admitted to hospital the day before we were due to check out.
I can’t thank them enough, took the stress out of what could have been a very worrying time.
Phil and Vicki

Love this Park!! Location is amazing, next to the Beach, can walk on the esplanade for miles.  Surf club and yacht club next door. Food and drinks available (surf club to Thurs to Sunday).  Park is very well maintained.  All amenities are great and very clean. Sites can be tight, depending on van size and what site you are on.  Suggest the drive thru sites for larger rigs.  Though reception staff are great at getting you the best site for your van.  Staff are friendly.
Great location. Good amenities.

We really appreciate our time down at your park and we so so appreciate your service and your care of your guests and the park itself
To come here at the beginning of the year is a wonderful way to start each year we have on this earth
Keep up the great work
Sites are very tight, big rigs will find access difficult.

Staff were appalling , after 7 month old booking included a request for a caravan spot close to a cabin... useless, did not listen or care!
Completely ruined the experience.

Lovely caravan park on the beach front. Generous sized  power site which was opposite beach & board walk. Amenities clean & modern. Very friendly helpful staff. Pub within walking distance, nice meals & views. Enjoyed our stay here

Love it  Love it
Brilliant Staff can't do enough and so very helpful
Amenities spotless and the position is A1
That's why we keep coming back, and back and back year after year
Xxx
Great location, helpful staff, excellent facilities, right next to a very safe beach and glorious sunsets!
A-B-S-O-L-U-T-E-L-Y STUNNING!!!!!!!!!!!!
Lovely park in an amazing location
Beautiful location, right on the beach.  The cabins are well appointed and nicely furnished.
Top spot. Staff were excellent. Amenities were great.

Stayed for a week recently and had a great time.
We used the ensuite sites that were brand new and excellent,  clean and well maintained,  the only down side is how tight the park sites are. The ensuite sites are drive thru thankfully as I would not want to reverse into them, the people opposite us had to wait for us to leave before they could get out the morning.
The beach is amazing but not exactly dog friendly, 10am till 8pm dogs have to be on lead, going back next year, hopefully the kiosk will be up and running.

Great location unfortunately that's the only positive, like others say it's a rat race to get in and out of. Sites are very tight with hardly any room to back in and out of (19ft van) One of the days our power was out & the duration the playground was under repairs, this was not advised to us at the time we booked so the kids was disappointed. Wont be staying there again

This is a little hidden pocket that i did not know existed in Adelaide ...mind you i grew up most of my life here  ...so stunning .... so peaceful ....a seriously gorgeous place to stay ..and you can virtually jump from your front door to the beach .... big thank you to Jodi for helping me with the booking coz online the cabins just werent explained clearly enough .... hey also they are PET FRIENDLY .. . Plus 2 seperate bedrooms with an ensuite ..so sweet ...
We only stayed one night in a budget cabin, then two nights on site. The park is right on the Beach. Lots of walking tracks along the foreshore.
Lovely park, dog friendly cabin are fab, beach access wonderful n surf club next door have great meals at a good price 👍🏼

Great location, neat and tidying park though it is quite tight, especially for larger Caravans. My single biggest gripe is their refusal to refund in full a deposit paid on a site with 3 MONTHS notice. I can understand fees to be paid if canceled with short notice. To be fair they offered a credit for 12 months but that is absolutely no use to us.
Seems like 2 bites of the cherry to me, our deposit plus payment from the booking they are certain to get in our place. Common decency has been lost to the almighty dollar.

5+ campsite. Amazing location, park was very well maintained and facilities were amazing. Loved the modern camp kitchen, and the 2km walk along the ocean front to the pier was great. Kids loved the free mini golf. Would recommend. The photo was the view from our van window. The surf club bistro next door was also great food and views of the sun sets.
I thought it was a bit expensive
Beautiful beach side park
Fun place to visit friends

Just a little shout-out and thank you for the exceptional service provided by the staff who are courteous and assisted us during a tough time.

The sites, location, and pet friendly caravan park make this an ideal location when visiting Adelaide.

South Australia has such amazing beaches ⛱️  best of all had my rescue Labrador with me and she loved being on the beach. Most definitely be back .
And that sunset was a winner 😍
Great location friendly staff fantastic views good price for cabin with three kids would definitely stay again plenty of activities for the kids on the holidays
Our 2nd visit. Great location with direct access to the beach. Kids love the Putt Putt golf. Cabin is clean and reasonably well-appointed.
Food is amazing. Neon Lights on the balcony food service was very slow but drinks were almost instant
Ok to park our caravan a couple of nights. Quiet at night, great access to dog friendly beach. Great for families.
This caravan park is a Great spot, good clean park but very tight to park your caravan
Beautiful spot, bit tight getting in for us, but lovely scenery, grassy spots, and clean amenities.

Caravan Park - great location pleasant park, good facilities.   Downside - was there for a full week never had a decent shower, the water would just suddenly cut off no water, then it would come back cold, then vary from hot to cold. Very frustrating. Staff had plumbers there but they didn't achieve much. Needs complete overhaul. One of main reasons we go to a CP is a decent hot shower. Disappointed
great spot!

The park is beautiful, well kept and clean. The staff are very friendly and accommodating. The facilities are well maintained. Being near the beach is great in summer for swimming. During the colder months it is still nice to walk along the beach.
Being close to restaurants and hotel is a bonus as they are walking distance.(Book in advance. They get booked out quickly)
Recommended the
Excellent

Great caravan park right by the ocean. Amenities very clean. The staff make the place so very helpful and friendly.
The park will be even better when the cafe n on suite's are completed.  Highly recommend
Amazing views, walking distance to most Facilities, Amazing and friendly staff. Accommodated our group of 30 plus  people for the last 10 ten days perfectly.
